title: cucurbita pepo var. pileiformis
intro: Cucurbita pepo var. pileiformis, also known as the ornamental or bottle gourd, is a type of vining plant belonging to the Cucurbitaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help to soothe digestive issues and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Cucurbita pepo var. pileiformis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory problems, and support immune function, making it a valuable addition to natural remedies. Herbal preparations of Cucurbita pepo var. pileiformis can be made into teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being used in topical applications such as poultices and compresses.
